title: Add Postgres, Redis/BullMQ, and search provider configuration scaffolding
description: Add package/environment scaffolding for DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, BRAVE_API_KEY, SERPAPI_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY; expose typed research configuration without breaking legacy RSS startup.
acceptance_criteria: Research APIs can detect missing Postgres/Redis/search config and report clear degradation; legacy RSS endpoints do not require research config.
test_mcp: npm run lint; npm run build
review_initial_requirements: research-jobs: Preserve legacy news behavior; web-discovery: Search multiple providers
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; audit: npm install reported 18 vulnerabilities, not changed by this issue

title: Add research domain types, URL canonicalization, and budget utilities
description: Create shared ResearchJob, SearchCandidate, CrawlDocument, EvidenceItem, ResearchReport types plus URL canonicalization/domain/content hash/budget helper functions.
acceptance_criteria: Utilities normalize duplicate URLs and enforce default maxDepth=3, maxUrlsPerRun=300, maxDomainsPerRun=50, runInterval=60min.
test_mcp: npm run lint; targeted unit tests if test runner exists
review_initial_requirements: crawl-pipeline: Enqueue crawl candidates; web-discovery: Normalize and deduplicate candidates
review_regression_requirements: Existing frontend/backend type imports remain valid

title: Add Postgres research schema initialization and repository methods
description: Implement Postgres schema initialization and repository methods for research jobs, candidates, documents, evidence, and reports.
acceptance_criteria: Research records can be created, listed, updated, and retrieved through repository methods; schema uses idempotent CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS.
review_initial_requirements: research-jobs: Create research jobs; research-reporting: Retrieve latest report
review_regression_requirements: SQLite db.ts and existing news queries continue compiling
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; validation_limited:no local Postgres configured, schema not executed against live DB; manual_test:set DATABASE_URL and call initResearchSchema()

title: Add graceful configuration errors for missing research infrastructure
description: Ensure research store/queue calls return explicit configuration errors when DATABASE_URL or REDIS_URL is missing, while legacy news APIs still work.
acceptance_criteria: Missing research config does not crash process startup; research APIs return clear 503-style errors.
test_mcp: npm run lint; manual call /api/health without DATABASE_URL
review_regression_requirements: Existing server startup path remains available without Postgres/Redis
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; manual_test:GET /api/research/status returns config status without DATABASE_URL/REDIS_URL

title: Implement query planning, provider abstraction, and search provider normalization
description: Add query planner and provider adapters for Brave, SerpApi, and Tavily; normalize provider responses into SearchCandidate objects and degrade missing keys.
acceptance_criteria: Configured providers produce normalized candidates; missing keys mark providers disabled and do not fail the run.
test_mcp: npm run lint; mocked provider normalization tests
review_initial_requirements: web-discovery: Plan search queries; Search multiple providers; Normalize and deduplicate candidates
review_regression_requirements: Provider code does not affect legacy RSS parsing
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; validation_limited:provider calls not executed without API keys; manual_test:set provider key and call searchConfiguredProviders()

title: Implement public page extraction, content hashing, link extraction, and budgeted link expansion
description: Add crawler utilities to fetch public pages, extract readable content, compute content hash, extract links, and filter/enqueue links within budget.
acceptance_criteria: Public pages store extracted text; blocked/unavailable pages store failed status; cross-domain links are considered within budget.
test_mcp: npm run lint; mocked HTML extraction tests
review_initial_requirements: crawl-pipeline: Extract public page content; Expand links across the web
review_regression_requirements: Existing rss.ts extraction helpers continue compiling
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; validation_limited:no live crawl executed; manual_test:call crawlPublicPage() with public URL

title: Implement relevance analysis and evidence extraction
description: Add AI-backed relevance/evidence analysis for crawled documents with fallback state when Gemini is unavailable or returns malformed JSON.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant documents get score/evidence; irrelevant documents do not create evidence; malformed AI output leaves retryable failed state.
test_mcp: npm run lint; mocked malformed JSON test
review_initial_requirements: research-analysis: Score document relevance; Extract evidence items; Handle AI analysis failure
review_regression_requirements: Existing analyzeContent news behavior remains unchanged
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; validation_limited:no live Gemini call without API key; manual_test:set GEMINI_API_KEY and call analyzeResearchDocument()

title: Implement Markdown report generation and retrieval
description: Generate Markdown reports from stored evidence and expose report metadata for retrieval/regeneration.
acceptance_criteria: Jobs with evidence produce Markdown report with summary, evidence sections, source links, generation time; not-ready jobs return explicit state.
test_mcp: npm run lint; report generation unit test
review_initial_requirements: research-reporting: Generate Markdown reports; Retrieve latest report; Regenerate reports
review_regression_requirements: Existing archive Markdown generation remains unaffected

title: Add research job APIs for create/list/detail/update/run/documents/report
description: Wire Express routes for research job creation, list, detail, pause/resume/budget update, manual run, documents list, and latest report retrieval.
acceptance_criteria: All new endpoints return JSON; missing research infra returns explicit error; manual run enqueues or executes a research run.
test_mcp: npm run lint; curl manual smoke when server runs
review_initial_requirements: research-jobs: Create/control lifecycle; research-reporting: Retrieve latest report

title: Add frontend research job, evidence, and report views
description: Add UI controls for research jobs, evidence list, and Markdown report viewing while keeping existing news stream accessible.
acceptance_criteria: User can switch between news and research surfaces; research views show job status, documents/evidence, and report content.
test_mcp: npm run lint; npm run build
review_initial_requirements: research-jobs: Create/control lifecycle; research-reporting: Retrieve latest report
review_regression_requirements: Existing NewsFeed and NewsCard views remain available

title: Add focused tests for utilities, provider normalization, budgets, and reports
description: Add local tests or lightweight test script for URL canonicalization, provider normalization, budget logic, and Markdown report generation.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover duplicate URL canonicalization, missing provider key degradation, budget skip, and report rendering.
test_mcp: npm run lint; npm test or npm run test:unit if added
review_initial_requirements: All added requirements with deterministic unit scenarios
review_regression_requirements: Test tooling does not break build scripts

title: Run validation and document limited validation for unavailable services
description: Run typecheck/build and record limited validation when Postgres/Redis/search API credentials are unavailable. Update CSV states and notes.
acceptance_criteria: Validation result is recorded; unavailable external services are documented with manual test steps and risk.
test_mcp: npm run lint; npm run build
review_initial_requirements: All capabilities have validation evidence or limited validation notes
review_regression_requirements: No uncommitted implementation files remain outside the active issue boundary
